title: HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS - 211info
text: DALLAS OFFICE HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eligibility determination for Medicaid and SNAP, licensing of adult foster care homes, private and pre-admission nursing home assessments, Senior Peer Mentoring, and health and wellness programs. 260 NE Kings Valley Highway Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and people with physical disabilities age 18 and over Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 831-0581 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 831-0581 Main phone (800) 846-9165 Adult Protective Services (866) 582-7458 Alternate Toll-free (503) 606-7601 FAX (888) 370-4307 TTY/TTD Main phone (503) 831-0581 Toll-free (866) 582-7458 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation and signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Polk County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in a two-story building next door to the Best Western Hotel and across from Walmart. If coming from Salem, take the second Dallas exit off Highway 22 and continue on Kings Valley Highway until Walmart. Services: Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Foster Home Placement Medicaid * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Older Adults Mentoring Programs * Older Adults Nursing Facility Referrals Wellness Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Wellness Programs * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DALLAS OFFICE
